name: Branchville Park
description: Come play pickleball at Branchville Park in Branchville, NJ! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: C. O. Johnson Park
description: C. O. Johnson Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Byram Township, NJ. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Fredon Rec Center
description: Come play pickleball at Fredon Rec Center in Newton, NJ! There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: Lake Mohawk Tennis Club
description: Come play pickleball at Lake Mohawk Tennis Club in Sparta, NJ! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts can be reserved.

name: Merriam Avenue School
description: Merriam Avenue School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Newton, NJ. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.
open_play_schedule: Open to the public during non-school hours

name: Ogdensburg Municipal Tennis Courts
description: Located behind the Ogdensburg Fire House

name: SAC
description: SAC is a place to play pickleball in Sparta, NJ. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Sparta Athletic Club
description: Sparta Athletic Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sparta, NJ. There are 7 hard courts. 5 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, food, water, and lights.

name: Sussex County YMCA
description: Sussex County YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Hamburg, NJ. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, locker rooms, and trainers or lessons. Reservations are not available. A membership is required to play.

name: Woodbourne Park
description: Come play pickleball at Woodbourne Park in Wantage, NJ! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.
